examples: She stood up and smoothed down her frock.
She waited in a new frock because the old one simply would not meet; but he never came.
One more frock passed in at the gate, and Tom's heart gave a great bound.
Ginnifer Goodwin also opted for pink, a beautiful cocktail frock from Oscar de la Renta.
Naomi Watts of The Impossible went for a backless frock in burgundy from Zac Posen.
